name: Zero Vault
description: Zero-knowledge password manager with XChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption. Autofill, sync, and vault access from your browser.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; default-src 'none'; connect-src https://13-61-144-124.nip.io wss://13-61-144-124.nip.io http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://192.168.100.44:* ws://192.168.100.44:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:
